add_params.name: Action
add_params.description: Always 'Set' when posting from this form. Also accepted via query string. PS1 switches on this value.

add_params.name: MaxDuration
add_params.description: ISO 8601 duration string (e.g. 'PT4H', 'P1D', 'P28D') or null/empty for no limit. Formatter sends MaxDuration?.value ?? null — unwraps from autocomplete object.

add_params.name: Action
add_params.description: GET requests use Action=Get query param. POST uses body.

notes: customDataformatter: hard-codes Action='Set' and unwraps MaxDuration autocomplete object to its .value string (or null if empty). PS1 reads $Request.Body.Action and $Request.Body.MaxDuration.value — note PS1 also reads .value from MaxDuration, but the formatter already extracts .value before POST. This means the body field 'MaxDuration' arrives as a plain string or null to the PS1.
